overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character crouching behind a white cargo van in a dimly lit industrial warehouse. The character explores the neon-lit interior, examining the architecture and passing through metal security gates into a restricted red-lit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading bay behind cargo van

events.description: character stands up from crouching position and begins moving around the van

agents.ego_description: crouching behind the white van as if hacking or hiding, then standing and cautiously moving around the vehicle

entered.detail: large white industrial van with red stripe, rear doors visible
stacks of cardboard shipping boxes and crates
horizontal cyan-blue neon light fixture on wall
large metal ventilation pipes running along ceiling
tall metal storage racks with yellow containers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character crouched behind a white cargo van in a dimly lit industrial bay. Blue neon lights illuminate the concrete walls as the character interacts with something near the van, then stands and begins moving around the vehicle. Cardboard boxes and industrial shelving line the space.

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing bright skylight streaming into the dark warehouse

agents.ego_description: walking slowly while looking up at the skylight and examining the industrial ceiling architecture

entered.detail: large rectangular skylight with bright white light streaming through metal grating
exposed steel support beams and trusses on ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the van, the character enters the main warehouse space and tilts the camera upward to observe a bright skylight cutting through the darkness. The mixed lighting creates dramatic shadows across the concrete floor and metal beams while stacks of boxes recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered warehouse storage area with stacked crates

agents.ego_description: navigating through the warehouse interior between stacks of boxes and industrial equipment

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping pallets and skids
large blue metal pallet jack or container
metal security fence with diamond mesh pattern blocking corridor
red neon tube lights illuminating the distant wall
machinery and tool cabinets along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the deeper warehouse storage area, passing wooden pallets and blue metal containers. The environment is lit by artificial blue and red neon lights. A metal chain-link fence becomes visible in the distance, marking the entrance to a restricted section.

scene_state.functional_zone: secured storage area with red emergency lighting

events.description: character passes through the metal chain-link fence gate into the red-lit secured area

agents.ego_description: moving through the metal security gate into a restricted corridor illuminated by red neon lights

entered.detail: metal work desk with equipment and monitors
large plastic or metal storage crates stacked near wall
narrow corridor illuminated by intense red neon lighting
heavy machinery and electrical panels on left wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the metal chain-link fence into a restricted area bathed in red neon light. Industrial desks and machinery line the walls as the camera moves deeper into the secured corridor, leaving the main warehouse storage behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial warehouse that transitions from a blue-toned storage bay into a restricted red-lit corridor. It begins with the character crouched behind a white cargo van amidst cardboard boxes and blue neon lighting before standing to move deeper into the facility. As the camera enters the main warehouse space, it tilts upward toward a bright skylight that casts dramatic shadows across the concrete floor and metal beams. The scene then shifts through a storage area filled with wooden pallets and blue metal containers, gradually approaching a distant chain-link fence. Finally, the camera passes through the fence and into a secured zone, where the lighting transforms into a deep red glow that illuminates industrial desks and machinery.
